mnemonics: S.P.D. - Sense, Process, Do. The 3 simple steps an IoT thing takes.
keyPoints: Sensing Layer: Where data is collected from the physical environment via sensors.
Network/Processing Layer: Where data is transmitted, stored, and analyzed.
Application Layer: Where analyzed data is used to perform an action or provide a service.
commonMistakes: Assuming cloud processing is always required; some architectures process data at the edge.
Forgetting the feedback loop; the application layer often sends commands back to actuators.
